---
id: delete-holiday
title: "Delete a single holiday"
description: "Removes a single holiday row from the calendar. Date must be ISO-8601 (yyyy-MM-dd)."
sidebar_label: "Delete a single holiday"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "delete api-method"
info_path: reference/api/trms-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Delete a single holiday"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"delete"}
  path={"/api/v1/calendars/{code}/holidays/{date}"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Removes a single holiday row from the calendar. Date must be ISO-8601 (yyyy-MM-dd).

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
